---
title: "Annotator Table"
format: html
server: shiny
---
```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(here)
library(arrow)
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(reactable)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

source(here("R", "mod_annotator_table.R"))
source(here("R", "utils_annotator.R"))
source(here("R", "themes.R"))

milestones <- read_parquet(here("inst", "datasets", "df_developmental_milestones.parquet"))

stopifnot(!anyDuplicated(milestones$id))
```
```{css}
.breakout {
  width: 100vw;
  position: relative;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  padding: 0 1rem;
}

.rt-td,
.rt-th {
  vertical-align: middle !important;
  padding: 6px 10px !important;
}

.card {
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
}

.card-header {
  font-weight: 600;
  background-color: #f8f9fa;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
}

.form-control[type="text"] {
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  padding: 2px 6px;
  height: auto;
}

.form-control::placeholder {
  color: #adb5bd;
}
```
```{r}
#| label: col-specs

col_specs <- list(
  list(name = "id",        type = "display",  label = "ID",        width = 60),
  list(name = "age",       type = "display",  label = "Age",       width = 110),
  list(name = "category",  type = "display",  label = "Category",  width = 180),
  list(name = "milestone", type = "display",  label = "Milestone", width = 420),
  list(name = "met",       type = "checkbox", label = "Met?",      width = 60),
  list(name = "notes",     type = "text",     label = "Notes",
       placeholder = "Short note...",          width = 200)
)
```
```{r}
#| label: ui
#| panel: fill

ui <- htmltools::div(
  class = "breakout",

  card(
    card_header("Developmental Milestones"),
    card_body(
      annotator_table_ui("milestones")
    )
  ),

  card(
    card_header("Annotations so far"),
    card_body(
      tableOutput("annotations_out")
    )
  )
)

ui
```
```{r}
#| label: server
#| context: server

source_data <- reactive(milestones)

annotations <- annotator_table_server(
  id          = "milestones",
  source_data = source_data,
  row_id      = "id",
  col_specs   = col_specs
)

output$annotations_out <- renderTable({
  ann <- annotations()

  if (nrow(ann) == 0) {
    return(data.frame(Message = "No milestones annotated yet."))
  }

  purrr::reduce(
    list(ann, milestones),
    ~ dplyr::left_join(.x, .y, by = "id")
  ) |>
    dplyr::select(id, age, category, milestone, met, notes)
})
```
